meta.business_goal: Cover Decision + Generation System dataset calibration

decision_factors: clear problem-solution hook in the headline
product board in background anchors the niche topic
bold bottom typography creates strong thumbnail impact
cool tech palette matches AI and hardware-analysis theme
realistic work setting makes the analysis feel practical

negative_constraints: avoid clutter over the presenter face
avoid placing key text outside safe margins
avoid making background poster text compete with the main headline

risk_notes: Do not infer or evaluate the real person's identity beyond visible on-image text.
Small background text should not be treated as reliably readable in generation targets.
Claims such as 全网最细 should be used cautiously if factual substantiation is required.
Generated variants should preserve text hierarchy so the bottom headline remains dominant.
